phases.name: Foundation
phases.theme: Dev environment, Git workflow, first deployment

projects.name: Portfolio site
projects.description: Next.js site deployed on Vercel. Public bootcamp tracker.

tasks.name: Set up GitHub account and first repo
tasks.description: Create account, init repo, push first commit via SSH

tasks.name: Configure local dev environment
tasks.description: Node, VS Code / Cursor, Git configured with SSH key

tasks.name: Deploy first page on Vercel
tasks.description: Live public URL, auto-deploys on git push

tasks.name: Daily commit habit
tasks.description: Every session ends with a push. No exceptions.

phases.name: Spec Quality
phases.theme: Writing specs that survive engineering scrutiny — handoff documents, not portfolio pieces

projects.name: Talent Pool Revival — full engineering spec
projects.description: Data model, matching logic, re-engagement UX, GDPR constraints, acceptance criteria, edge cases. Good enough to put in front of Engineering.

tasks.name: Write full engineering spec for Talent Pool Revival
tasks.description: Data model, API endpoints needed, UX flows, GDPR constraints, acceptance criteria

tasks.name: Write TARA v2 PRD
tasks.description: What the Engineering team would need to build and own it — data model, failure states, GDPR scope

tasks.name: Send one spec to an engineer for review
tasks.description: Ask one question: what is the first thing missing? Use the answer to rewrite.

phases.name: What's Underneath
phases.theme: API depth — rate limits, error states, data contracts, not just happy paths

projects.name: Claude API audit + Greenhouse deep-dive
projects.description: What are the actual rate limits, error states, token costs? What data does Greenhouse actually expose?

tasks.name: Claude API audit document
tasks.description: Rate limits, token counting, streaming failure modes, cost at scale for TARA

tasks.name: Greenhouse ATS — Postman collection
tasks.description: Document what fields actually exist, what's missing vs. what the Talent Pool spec assumes

tasks.name: Webhook architecture diagram
tasks.description: Full event flow: application → screening → interview → decision. Every system, every trigger, every failure state.

phases.name: Demo → Production
phases.theme: Error handling, logging, GDPR basics — making tools survive real use

projects.name: TARA — hardened for production
projects.description: Add error states, logging, and GDPR review to the existing tool. Plus first real n8n automation.

tasks.name: Add error states for every failure mode
tasks.description: API down, empty response, timeout, out-of-scope query — all handled with user-facing messages

tasks.name: Add basic request logging
tasks.description: Request in, response out, errors — all written to logs with timestamps

tasks.name: GDPR audit of existing tools
tasks.description: What employee data is handled, where it goes, how long it lives, what Legal would flag

tasks.name: n8n automation — Final Round trigger
tasks.description: ATS stage change → calendar hold + Slack notification. Document webhook logic and failure handling.

phases.name: Real RAG
phases.theme: Vector search, embeddings, Supabase pgvector — semantic retrieval over real documents

projects.name: TARA v2 — vector store + Candidate Screener
projects.description: Replace Notion lookup with pgvector embeddings. Then build multi-step screener agent.

tasks.name: Set up Supabase with pgvector
tasks.description: Enable extension, create embeddings table with correct schema

tasks.name: Replace TARA's Notion lookup with vector search
tasks.description: Chunk documents, embed each chunk, store in pgvector, query by semantic similarity

tasks.name: Build Candidate Screener agent
tasks.description: Multi-step: takes JD → reads CVs → scores each → writes recruiter recommendation. Uses tool calling.

tasks.name: Human-in-the-loop design doc
tasks.description: Where should AI stop and a human decide? Design the approval gate. What does the recruiter see? What can they override?

phases.name: The Handoff
phases.theme: Ship one complete product with everything an Engineering team needs to build and own it

projects.name: TA AI Assistant v1.0 — full engineering package
projects.description: JD input + CV upload → match scores + gap analysis + draft outreach. PRD, user stories, acceptance criteria, API spec, data model, error states, GDPR notes, demo.

tasks.name: Complete README
tasks.description: What it does, how to run it, API keys needed, known limitations, architecture overview

tasks.name: Record demo video
tasks.description: Under 3 minutes, screen recording, narrated walkthrough of the full flow

tasks.name: Publish LinkedIn post
tasks.description: What you built, what you learned, link to live tool and GitHub repo

tasks.name: Full engineering package
tasks.description: PRD, user stories, acceptance criteria, API spec, data model, error states, GDPR notes — everything an engineer needs to pick it up on Monday
